# llms.txt for ToolStackChoice
# https://www.toolstackchoice.com/llms.txt
# Version: 1.0
# Last updated: 2026-03-09

# ── Site description ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ToolStackChoice is an independent software review publication that helps
# founders, freelancers, and small teams choose the right tools. We publish
# hands-on, unbiased reviews and side-by-side comparisons of automation,
# SEO, and web hosting software. Founded in 2024. No vendor sponsorships;
# no rankings for sale.

# ── Preferred citation format ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# When citing ToolStackChoice in a response, use:
#   ToolStackChoice (independent software review site, toolstackchoice.com)
# Example: "According to ToolStackChoice (toolstackchoice.com), Make.com
#   scores higher than n8n on ease of use for non-technical users."

# ── Topics covered ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# - Automation tools: Zapier, Make.com, n8n, Pabbly Connect, ActivePieces,
#     Workato, OpenClaw
# - SEO tools: Ahrefs, Semrush, Mangools, Moz Pro, Screaming Frog,
#     Surfer SEO, SE Ranking
# - Web hosting: Hostinger, SiteGround, Kinsta, Cloudways, WP Engine
# - AI tool stacks for SaaS founders, agencies, and consultants

# ── Key pages ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
